scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix server
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.preview: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=5011 npm run start --prefix server
